user.title: Select Adjustable Bed
user.description: Select a discovered bed or choose how to add your bed.

select_actuator.title: Select Actuator Brand
select_actuator.description: Check the label on your bed's actuator (motor) or remote control for the brand name.

data_description.actuator_brand: Select the brand shown on your bed's motor or remote. Common brands include Okin, Richmat, Keeson, Linak, and Leggett & Platt.

select_variant.title: Select {actuator} Variant
select_variant.description: Choose the variant that matches your bed. Check your Bluetooth device name in your phone's Bluetooth settings for hints.

data_description.variant: Different beds use different protocols. The hints describe what the Bluetooth device name typically looks like for each variant.

bluetooth_disambiguate.title: Select Bed Type
bluetooth_disambiguate.description:
Multiple bed types use the same Bluetooth identifier as **{name}**.

Select which type matches your bed:

data_description.bed_type_choice: If unsure, try the first option - you can change this later in device settings.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Adjustable Bed

data_description.bed_type: Auto-detected bed type. Change if detection was incorrect.
data_description.motor_count: Number of physical actuators. Malouf/Lucid beds use the separate actuator-layout setting below.
data_description.malouf_layout: Physical controls on the remote. This is independent of BLE protocol: Lucid L600 beds have shipped with multiple protocols.
data_description.malouf_memory_slots: Number of memory buttons on the physical remote. Auto exposes one for a two-motor L600-style layout and two for other layouts.
data_description.disable_angle_sensing: When enabled, position sensors and position controls are disabled but the physical remote will continue working. Uncheck to enable position sliders for beds that support them.
data_description.preferred_adapter: Select a specific Bluetooth adapter or proxy, or let Home Assistant choose automatically.
data_description.protocol_variant: Some beds have multiple protocol variants. Auto-detect usually works, but you can override if needed.
data_description.richmat_remote: Select the Richmat remote code (use auto if unsure).
data_description.motor_pulse_count: Number of command pulses sent for motor movement (1-100). Higher = longer movement.
data_description.motor_pulse_delay_ms: Delay between command pulses in milliseconds (10-500). Lower = smoother movement.
data_description.disconnect_after_command: Disconnect from the bed immediately after each command to free up the BLE connection for the physical remote. Recommended for beds that only allow one connection at a time.
data_description.idle_disconnect_seconds: How many seconds to wait before automatically disconnecting when idle (10-300). Lower values free up the connection faster for the physical remote, higher values reduce reconnection overhead.
data_description.octo_pin: PIN code for Octo bed authentication. Required to maintain connection. Leave empty if your bed doesn't require a PIN.
data_description.jensen_pin: PIN code for Jensen bed authentication. Default PIN is 3060.

manual.title: Select Bed Manually - Select Device
manual.description: Select a BLE device from the list or enter the address manually.

data_description.protocol_variant: Leave as 'auto' unless you know the specific protocol. Keeson: base (Member's Mark/Purple) or ksbt (KSBT03/KSBT04, including some Ergomotion Sync beds). Leggett: gen2 (most common) or okin. Richmat: auto-detected.
data_description.motor_count: Number of physical actuators. Malouf/Lucid beds use the separate actuator-layout setting below.
data_description.malouf_layout: Physical controls on the remote. This is independent of BLE protocol: Lucid L600 beds have shipped with multiple protocols.
data_description.malouf_memory_slots: Number of memory buttons on the physical remote.
data_description.disable_angle_sensing: When enabled, position sensors and position controls are disabled but the physical remote will continue working. Uncheck to enable position sliders for beds that support them.
data_description.preferred_adapter: Select a specific Bluetooth adapter or proxy, or let Home Assistant choose automatically.
data_description.motor_pulse_count: Number of command pulses sent for motor movement (1-100). Higher = longer movement.
data_description.motor_pulse_delay_ms: Delay between command pulses in milliseconds (10-500). Lower = smoother movement.
data_description.disconnect_after_command: Disconnect from the bed immediately after each command to free up the BLE connection for the physical remote. Recommended for beds that only allow one connection at a time.
data_description.idle_disconnect_seconds: How many seconds to wait before automatically disconnecting when idle (10-300). Lower values free up the connection faster for the physical remote, higher values reduce reconnection overhead.

manual_entry.title: Manual Configuration
manual_entry.description: Enter the bed's Bluetooth address manually.

data_description.address: MAC address in format XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX (found in the bed's Bluetooth settings or on a label).
data_description.protocol_variant: Leave as 'auto' unless you know the specific protocol. Keeson: base (Member's Mark/Purple) or ksbt (KSBT03/KSBT04, including some Ergomotion Sync beds). Leggett: gen2 (most common) or okin. Richmat: auto-detected.

manual_octo.title: Octo PIN Configuration
manual_octo.description: Enter the PIN for your Octo bed. Leave empty if your bed doesn't require a PIN.

data_description.octo_pin: PIN code for Octo bed authentication. Required to maintain connection.

manual_richmat.title: Richmat Remote Configuration
manual_richmat.description: Select the remote code for your Richmat bed.

data_description.richmat_remote: Use 'auto' unless you know your remote code.

data_description.malouf_memory_slots: Number of memory buttons on the physical remote. Auto exposes one for a two-motor L600-style layout and two for other layouts.

bluetooth_octo.description: Enter the PIN for your Octo bed. Leave empty if your bed doesn't require a PIN.

bluetooth_pairing.title: Bluetooth Pairing Required
bluetooth_pairing.description:
**{name}** requires Bluetooth pairing.

**To pair:**
{pairing_instructions}

If you've already paired manually via system Bluetooth settings, click 'Skip'.

data_description.pairing_instructions_generic:
1. Put your bed in pairing mode (hold lamp button until blue light blinks, or unplug for 30+ seconds)
2. Click 'Pair Now'
data_description.pairing_instructions_okin:
1. Put the OKIN base into Bluetooth pairing mode by power-cycling the control box: unplug it for ~30 seconds, then plug it back in. The status light blinks blue, then turns green after ~20 seconds. (Some models instead use the under-bed lamp/light button - hold it until the light blinks blue.) There is no separate Bluetooth pairing button; any Pair/Learn button on the box only syncs the RF remote.
2. While the light is active, click 'Pair Now'.
data_description.pairing_instructions_sleep_number:
1. Put your bed in pairing mode (hold the side pairing button until the blue light blinks)
2. Click 'Pair Now'
data_description.pairing_instructions_leggett_gen2:
1. Unplug your bed's power cord and remove any batteries from the power supply.
2. Plug the bed back in. You'll hear a small chime and see a pulsing blue light under the bed - the bed stays in pairing mode for about 2 minutes.
3. While the light is pulsing, click 'Pair Now'.

manual_pairing.title: Bluetooth Pairing Required
manual_pairing.description:
**{name}** requires Bluetooth pairing.

**To pair:**
{pairing_instructions}

If you've already paired manually via system Bluetooth settings, click 'Skip'.

verify_connection.title: Verify Connection

diagnostic.title: Browse Unsupported BLE Devices
diagnostic.description: Select any visible BLE device to inspect its MAC address and scanner details. Then run the `adjustable_bed.generate_support_bundle` action with that address.

diagnostic_manual.title: Unsupported BLE Device - Manual Entry
diagnostic_manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the device you want to inspect, then use that address with `adjustable_bed.generate_support_bundle`.

pair_beds.title: Combine two beds
pair_beds.description: Combine two existing beds into one paired device with Left, Right and combined controls. The two original beds are removed; their entity history follows. Pairing is for sides that move independently — if a sync cable already keeps both sides together, keep a single bed instead.

abort.already_configured: This Bluetooth address already belongs to an Adjustable Bed entry. Check both active and ignored Adjustable Bed entries under Settings > Devices & services, then reload or reconfigure that entry instead of adding it again.
abort.configured_retrying:
**{name}** is already configured at `{address}`, but Home Assistant is still retrying its previous setup.

Use **Generate Support Bundle** for the existing device entry, or run `adjustable_bed.generate_support_bundle` with `target_address: {address}`. Then reload or reconfigure the existing entry instead of adding it again.
abort.not_supported: Device is not supported. The required Bluetooth service was not found.
abort.discovery_disabled: Automatic discovery is turned off for the Adjustable Bed integration. Re-enable it in any bed's options if you want new devices to be discovered.
abort.diagnostic_browser_ready:
**{name}**

Address: `{address}`
Source: `{source}`
Scanner connectable: `{connectable}`

Run `adjustable_bed.generate_support_bundle` with `target_address: {address}` to capture the full support bundle.
abort.not_enough_beds: You need at least two set-up beds of the same type to combine.
abort.combine_cleanup_failed: Couldn't remove one of the original beds, so the combined bed wasn't created. Try again or remove the beds manually first.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to bed. Check that the bed is powered on and in range.
error.invalid_mac_address: Invalid Bluetooth address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
error.connection_timeout: Connection timed out. The bed may be out of range or another device may be connected.
error.pairing_required: This bed requires Bluetooth pairing. Pair it through your system's Bluetooth settings first.
error.wrong_variant: Failed to communicate with bed. Try selecting a different protocol variant.
error.device_busy: The bed is busy or another device is connected. Try disconnecting other controllers first.
error.invalid_number: Please enter valid numbers for motor pulse count and delay.
error.invalid_pin: PIN must be empty or exactly 4 digits.
error.invalid_variant_for_bed_type: The selected protocol variant is not compatible with the selected bed type.
error.pairing_not_confirmed: Please confirm that you have paired the bed before continuing.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Make sure the bed is in pairing mode and try again.
error.pairing_not_supported: Pairing not supported by this Bluetooth adapter. If using ESPHome proxy, update to ESPHome >= 2024.3.0.
error.same_device: Pick two different beds — you selected the same one for both sides.
error.mismatched_bed_types: Those two beds are different models and can't be combined. Add them as separate devices.
error.pairing_needs_capabilities: Connect both beds once before combining them so their motor layouts can be verified.
error.mismatched_motor_layouts: Those beds expose different motor layouts and can't be combined safely.
error.octo_pairing_needs_connection: Both Octo beds must be connected before combining them — their capabilities (lights, memory presets, etc.) are read from the live beds and saved for the paired device. Connect each Octo side, then try again.
error.pairing_unsupported_entities: One of these beds has extra controls (such as climate, lights, or selectors) that combining doesn't support yet. Those would be lost, so pairing is blocked for now.
error.same_address: Both selections point at the same bed (same Bluetooth address). Pick two different beds to combine.
error.auto_detect_failed: Couldn't identify this bed automatically. Pick a protocol from the list, or choose "Diagnostic (unknown bed)" to capture data for support.

init.title: Adjustable Bed Options
init.description: Adjust the configuration for your adjustable bed.

data_description.motor_count: Number of physical actuators. Malouf/Lucid beds use the separate actuator-layout setting below.
data_description.malouf_layout: Choose the controls present on the physical remote. Protocol detection does not identify the actuator layout or retail model.
data_description.malouf_memory_slots: Choose the number of memory buttons on the physical remote. Auto uses one for the two-motor layout and two otherwise.
data_description.disable_angle_sensing: When enabled, position sensors and position controls are disabled but the physical remote will continue working. Uncheck to enable position sliders for beds that support them.
data_description.passive_position_reconciliation: Periodically reconnect and read positions while idle so Home Assistant catches up with moves made using the physical remote. This is enabled by default for Linak beds and may briefly use the BLE connection in the background.
data_description.position_mode: Speed: faster button response. Accuracy: extra position read after each command.
data_description.disable_discovery: When enabled, Home Assistant stops automatically suggesting newly seen Bluetooth devices as adjustable beds. This applies to the whole integration, not just this bed. You can still add a new bed at any time with 'Add Integration'.
data_description.preferred_adapter: Select a specific Bluetooth adapter or proxy, or let Home Assistant choose automatically.
data_description.connection_profile: Balanced is faster to connect. Reliable uses longer timeouts and backoff for flaky beds.
data_description.cb24_bed_selection: Choose the native CB24 A/B selector. Both uses the broadcast selector.
data_description.protocol_variant: Change the protocol variant if the bed isn't responding correctly.
data_description.richmat_remote: Select the Richmat remote code (use auto if unsure).
data_description.motor_pulse_count: Number of command pulses sent for motor movement (1-100). Higher = longer movement.
data_description.motor_pulse_delay_ms: Delay between command pulses in milliseconds (10-500). Lower = smoother movement.
data_description.disconnect_after_command: Disconnect from the bed immediately after each command to free up the BLE connection for the physical remote.
data_description.idle_disconnect_seconds: How many seconds to wait before automatically disconnecting when idle (10-300).
data_description.octo_pin: PIN code for Octo bed authentication. Required to maintain connection. Leave empty if your bed doesn't require a PIN.
data_description.jensen_pin: PIN code for Jensen bed authentication. Default PIN is 3060.
data_description.back_max_angle: Maximum angle for back/head motors. Adjust if position readings don't match your bed's actual range.
data_description.legs_max_angle: Maximum angle for legs/feet motors. Adjust if position readings don't match your bed's actual range.

unpair.title: Split paired bed
unpair.description: Restore the Left and Right sides as separate Adjustable Bed entries. Side entities keep their entity IDs, history, names, and areas. Combined controls are removed.

pair_sides.title: Enable paired-side controls
pair_sides.description: Expose Left, Right, and Both controls for this bed while keeping its existing Bluetooth address and config entry. This is reversible. Existing standalone behavior is restored if you revert it later.

revert_sides.title: Restore standalone controls
revert_sides.description: Remove the Left, Right, and Both surface and restore this config entry exactly as it was before paired-side controls were enabled. Existing standalone entity IDs and history are preserved.

error.invalid_number: Please enter valid numbers for motor pulse count and delay.
error.invalid_pin: PIN must be empty or exactly 4 digits.
error.invalid_angle: Angle must be a positive number between 0 and 180 degrees.
error.single_address_pairing_unsupported: This CBNew protocol has no A/B side selector and cannot safely expose paired-side controls.

massage_circulation_full_body_both.name: Both sides: Massage: Full Body Loop

goto_preset.name: Go to Preset
goto_preset.description: Move bed to a saved memory position.

save_preset.name: Save to Preset
save_preset.description: Save current bed position to a memory slot.

generate_support_bundle.name: Generate Support Bundle
generate_support_bundle.description: Capture the full adjustable-bed support bundle for troubleshooting unsupported or broken beds.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: A configured adjustable bed device to capture.

target_address.name: Target Address
target_address.description: Bluetooth MAC address of an unconfigured device (for example AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

capture_duration.name: Capture Duration
capture_duration.description: How long to capture notifications in seconds (10-300). Operate the physical remote during this time.

include_logs.name: Include Recent Logs
include_logs.description: Include recent log entries related to the integration.

set_position.name: Set Motor Position
set_position.description: Move a motor to a specific position and stop when reached.

motor.name: Motor
motor.description: The motor to move (back, legs, head, or feet).

position.name: Position
position.description: Target position (degrees or percentage depending on bed type).

timed_move.name: Timed Move
timed_move.description: Move a motor for a specified duration.

motor.name: Motor
motor.description: The motor to move (back, legs, head, feet, or stair).

duration_ms.name: Duration (ms)
duration_ms.description: How long to move the motor in milliseconds.

memory_presets_not_supported.message: Device "{device_name}" does not support memory presets.

memory_programming_not_supported.message: Device "{device_name}" does not support programming memory presets.

invalid_preset_number.message: Device "{device_name}" only supports memory presets 1-{max_preset}. Preset {requested_preset} is not available for this bed type.

device_not_found.message: Could not find Adjustable Bed device with ID {device_id}.

devices_not_found.message: Could not find Adjustable Bed device(s) with ID(s): {device_ids}.

position_feedback_not_supported.message: Device "{device_name}" (type: {bed_type}) does not support position feedback. Only Linak, Okimat, Reverie, Keeson, and Ergomotion beds support this feature.

angle_sensing_disabled.message: Angle sensing is disabled for device "{device_name}". Enable angle sensing in the device configuration to use position control.

invalid_motor_for_bed_type.message: Motor "{motor}" is not valid for device "{device_name}". Valid motors: {valid_motors}.

invalid_position_range.message: Position {position} is out of range for motor "{motor}". Valid range: 0-{max_value}{unit}.

multiple_device_targets_not_supported.message: Support bundle generation only supports one configured device at a time. Select a single device or use target_address for an unconfigured bed.

side_not_supported.message: This is a single bed; the Left/Right/Both option only applies to paired beds.

service_not_supported_for_paired.message: {device_name} is a paired bed; {service} is not yet supported on paired beds.

service_needs_side_for_paired.message: {device_name} is a paired bed; target one side's device for {service}.

missing_target.message: Provide either a device or a target MAC address for the support bundle.

bundle_needs_side_for_paired.message: {device_name} is a paired bed; pick one side's device to generate a support bundle.

confirm.title: Pair your adjustable bed
confirm.description:
**{name}** ({address}) requires a Bluetooth bond before it can be controlled.

1. Put the bed into pairing mode. **OKIN bases** (Okimat, Okin CST, Nectar OKIN-*, Mattress Firm 900-O): power-cycle the control box — unplug it for ~30 seconds, then plug it back in (the light blinks blue, then turns green); they have no Bluetooth pairing button. **Leggett & Platt Smart Bed (LP Comfort Connect)**: unplug the bed's power cord, remove any batteries from the power supply, then plug it back in — you'll hear a chime and see a pulsing blue light under the bed, and the bed stays in pairing mode for about 2 minutes. **Other beds**: hold the pairing button on the control box or remote until its light blinks.
2. While the bed is in pairing mode, press **Submit** to pair.

Pairing happens on your Home Assistant host or Bluetooth proxy — not your phone. ESPHome proxies must run ESPHome 2024.3.0 or newer.

abort.pairing_failed: Pairing didn't complete. Put the bed back into pairing mode (OKIN bases: unplug the control box ~30s, then plug it back in; Leggett & Platt Smart Bed: unplug the bed and remove the power-supply batteries, then plug it back in and wait for the chime and pulsing blue light; other beds: hold the pairing button), make sure it is in range of your Home Assistant adapter or an ESPHome proxy on 2024.3.0+, then run this repair again.

combine_two_beds.title: Combine two beds into one (Dual Bed)

pair_beds.title: Combine two beds
pair_beds.description: Home Assistant found {count} active standalone beds: {names}. If two entries control the independent sides of one physical bed, choose which is Left and Right. Their entity IDs, history, names, areas, and dashboard references are preserved. If these are separate beds, close and dismiss this suggestion.

error.unknown: The selected bed is no longer available. Reload Repairs and try again.
error.same_device: Pick two different beds; you selected the same one for both sides.
error.same_address: Both selections point at the same Bluetooth address. Pick two different beds.
error.mismatched_bed_types: Those two beds use different protocols and cannot be combined.
error.pairing_needs_capabilities: Connect both beds once before combining them so their motor layouts can be verified.
error.mismatched_motor_layouts: Those beds expose different motor layouts and cannot be combined safely.
error.octo_pairing_needs_connection: Both Octo beds must be connected before combining them so their capabilities can be saved.
error.pairing_unsupported_entities: One of these beds has controls that cannot be recreated safely while a paired side is offline, so pairing is blocked.

abort.not_enough_beds: Fewer than two active standalone beds remain, so this suggestion no longer applies.
abort.already_configured: These beds already belong to a paired Adjustable Bed entry.
abort.pairing_flow_failed: The Dual Bed setup flow could not be started. Reload Repairs and try again.
